headline: Apple’s entry-level MacBook Pro could be up for a redesign
summary: Apple reportedly plans a "revamped" entry-level MacBook Pro. Its launch could happen as soon as the first half of 2027. Four new iPad Pros are also set for a spring release with internal upgrades.

headline: The funeral for PlayStation discs has begun
summary: Sony will stop making discs for new PlayStation games by January 2028. Retailers and gamers express sadness over the loss of physical media. This move raises concerns about game preservation and consumer choice.

headline: Xbox’s ‘reset’: all the news about Microsoft's looming layoffs and studio closures
summary: Xbox is undergoing a major "reset" due to significant business challenges. Internal memos warn of potential layoffs and studio closures. CEO Asha Sharma and CCO Matt Booty announced the changes.

headline: Elon Musk denies a report about SpaceX's AI phone prototype
summary: Elon Musk calls a report about a SpaceX AI phone prototype "utterly false." The Wall Street Journal claimed SpaceX showed a "handset-like prototype" to investors. The alleged device was described as "slimmer than an iPhone."

headline: Onimusha: Way of the Sword Release Date Moved Forward
summary: Capcom announced an earlier release date for Onimusha: Way of the Sword. The action-adventure sequel will now launch on September 4th. It will be available on PC, PS5, Xbox Series X|S, and Nintendo Switch 2.

headline: The $1,800 Power Lift Recliner and Massage Chair Is $380 During the Wayfair 4th of July Sale
summary: A high-end power lift recliner and massage chair is heavily discounted. Originally $1,800, it's now just $380 at the Wayfair 4th of July Sale. This is a massive saving on a comfort-focused chair.

headline: Marvel Super Heroes Comes to Magic: The Gathering
summary: Marvel Super Heroes are being introduced to Magic: The Gathering. The collaboration brings iconic characters to the popular card game. This crossover aims to attract new players and excite fans.

headline: Marvel Refused to Tell Sadie Sink About Her Spider-Man: Brand New Day Character Until Filming Started
summary: Sadie Sink's Spider-Man: Brand New Day character was a closely guarded secret. Marvel kept her character's identity from her until filming began. She didn't see the script before arriving in London for the Marvel movie.

headline: People smuggler convicted in France found by BBC living in UK and seeking asylum
summary: A convicted people smuggler, once called "the godfather" of French migrant camps, was found in the UK. The individual is reportedly working in a Leicestershire village. He is also said to be seeking asylum in the UK.

headline: Watch: People smuggler tracked down and confronted by BBC
summary: The BBC tracked down a convicted people smuggler living in Leicestershire. The individual is seeking asylum and allegedly working illegally. The BBC confronted him in a revealing report.

headline: At least 13 killed in large-scale Russian missile and drone strikes on Kyiv
summary: Kyiv suffered its largest Russian missile and drone strikes in weeks. At least 13 people were killed, with children among the casualties. Ukrainian officials reported a "significant number" of victims.

headline: Starmer to formally apologise to victims of forced adoptions
summary: Labour leader Keir Starmer will formally apologize for forced adoptions. Thousands of babies were taken from mothers between 1949 and 1976. The apology acknowledges the historical trauma faced by victims.
